---
title: "shiny.webawesome announcement prototype"
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: false
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
filters:
  - shinylive
---

::: {.callout-note}
This is a working prototype for the eventual r-posts.com / R-bloggers
announcement. The first goal is to prove that Quarto, Shinylive, webR,
R-universe, and the `shiny.webawesome` runtime can all work together.
:::

## TL;DR

`shiny.webawesome` brings Web Awesome components to R Shiny through generated
R wrappers, Shiny bindings, and a bundled Web Awesome runtime.

Links to add after CRAN publication:

- CRAN
- Package website
- Source repository
- R-universe

## Background

Placeholder.

## The Whole Game

This example is intentionally tighter: a small data workbench that keeps the
controls visible, keeps the preview visible, and makes every interaction show
up immediately in the active tab.

```{=html}
<style>
#quarto-document-content div.sourceCode,
#quarto-document-content pre.sourceCode {
  max-height: 30rem;
  overflow: auto;
  border-radius: 16px;
}
</style>
```

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 680

library(shiny)
library(shiny.webawesome)
library(htmltools)
library(ggplot2)

ui <- webawesomePage(
  title = "Iris Workbench",
  tags$style(HTML("
    body {
      margin: 0;
      background: var(--wa-color-surface-default);
      color: var(--wa-color-text-normal, #1f2937);
      font-family: var(--wa-font-family-body, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif);
    }

    .workbench-shell {
      min-height: 100vh;
      padding: 18px;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at top left, color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-brand-fill-loud) 16%, transparent), transparent 28%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-surface-default) 90%, white), var(--wa-color-surface-default));
    }

    .workbench-stage {
      width: min(1080px, 100%);
      margin: 0 auto;
      display: grid;
      gap: 14px;
    }

    .workbench-kicker {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-text-normal, #1f2937) 72%, white);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .workbench-layout {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 280px minmax(0, 1fr);
      gap: 14px;
      align-items: start;
    }

    .title-card,
    .sidebar-card,
    .preview-card,
    .stat-card {
      --wa-panel-border-radius: 22px;
      border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-surface-border) 80%, white);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
    }

    .title-card,
    .preview-card {
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-surface-default) 92%, white);
    }

    .sidebar-card {
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-neutral-fill-normal) 12%, white);
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
    }

    .title-stack,
    .sidebar-stack,
    .preview-stack,
    .stats-grid,
    .tab-stack {
      display: grid;
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .title-line {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 2rem;
      line-height: 1;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    }

    .title-copy,
    .sidebar-note,
    .tab-copy,
    .details-copy {
      margin: 0;
      color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-text-normal, #1f2937) 72%, white);
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    .badge-row,
    .button-row {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 8px;
      align-items: center;
    }

    .button-row > * {
      flex: 1 1 0;
    }

    .stats-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    .stat-card {
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-brand-fill-loud) 4%, white);
    }

    .stat-label {
      color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-text-normal, #1f2937) 60%, white);
      font-size: 0.76rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    }

    .stat-value {
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      font-weight: 800;
    }

    .preview-header {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      align-items: center;
    }

    .plot-shell,
    .table-shell {
      border-radius: 18px;
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-surface-default) 96%, white);
      border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-surface-border) 80%, white);
      padding: 8px 10px;
    }

    .table-shell table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      font-size: 0.92rem;
    }

    .table-shell th,
    .table-shell td {
      padding: 8px 10px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-surface-border) 70%, white);
      text-align: left;
    }

    .table-shell th {
      font-size: 0.76rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--wa-color-text-normal, #1f2937) 58%, white);
    }

    .tab-shell {
      min-height: 380px;
    }

    @media (max-width: 860px) {
      .workbench-layout,
      .stats-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .sidebar-card {
        position: static;
      }
    }
  ")),
  wa_drawer(
    "help_drawer",
    label = "Inspector",
    placement = "end",
    footer = wa_button("close_help", "Close", appearance = "outlined"),
    wa_container(
      class = "wa-stack",
      style = "gap: 1rem;",
      wa_callout(
        variant = "brand",
        appearance = "soft",
        icon = "circle-info",
        "This example keeps the controls visible and lets each tab react immediately."
      ),
      wa_card(
        header = "Current view",
        wa_container(class = "wa-stack", style = "gap: 0.5rem;", uiOutput("inspector_state"))
      ),
      wa_card(
        header = "Why this shape works",
        wa_container(
          class = "wa-stack",
          style = "gap: 0.5rem;",
          p(class = "details-copy", "The left rail is persistent, the preview stays in frame, and the tab group shows three distinct presentation modes without making the demo feel like a dashboard.")
        )
      )
    )
  ),
  wa_container(
    class = "workbench-shell",
    wa_container(
      class = "workbench-stage",
      wa_container(
        class = "workbench-kicker",
        wa_badge("Live in the browser", appearance = "accent"),
        span("Powered by Shinylive and Web Awesome"),
        span("A compact iris workbench")
      ),
      wa_card(
        class = "title-card",
        wa_container(
          class = "title-stack",
          wa_container(
            class = "badge-row",
            wa_badge("Iris", appearance = "accent"),
            wa_badge("ggplot2", appearance = "outlined"),
            wa_badge("Reactive tabs", appearance = "outlined")
          ),
          h2(class = "title-line", "Shiny can shape a polished analytic surface with Web Awesome."),
          p(
            class = "title-copy",
            "Use the left rail to change the view. The chart, summary table, and details tab all respond immediately without making you hunt around the page."
          )
        )
      ),
      wa_container(
        class = "workbench-layout",
        wa_card(
          class = "sidebar-card",
          header = "Controls",
          wa_container(
            class = "sidebar-stack",
            wa_select(
              "species",
              label = "Species",
              value = "all",
              wa_option("All species", value = "all"),
              wa_option("Setosa", value = "setosa"),
              wa_option("Versicolor", value = "versicolor"),
              wa_option("Virginica", value = "virginica")
            ),
            wa_select(
              "x_var",
              label = "X variable",
              value = "Sepal.Length",
              wa_option("Sepal length", value = "Sepal.Length"),
              wa_option("Sepal width", value = "Sepal.Width"),
              wa_option("Petal length", value = "Petal.Length"),
              wa_option("Petal width", value = "Petal.Width")
            ),
            uiOutput("tab_specific_controls"),
            wa_container(
              class = "button-row",
              wa_button("preset_sepal", "Sepal preset", appearance = "outlined"),
              wa_button("preset_petal", "Petal preset", appearance = "outlined")
            ),
            wa_button("open_help", "Open inspector", appearance = "accent"),
            p(class = "sidebar-note", textOutput("sidebar_note"))
          )
        ),
        wa_card(
          class = "preview-card",
          wa_container(
            class = "preview-stack",
            wa_container(
              class = "preview-header",
              wa_container(
                class = "badge-row",
                uiOutput("selection_badges")
              ),
              wa_badge(textOutput("tab_badge", inline = TRUE), appearance = "accent")
            ),
            wa_container(
              class = "stats-grid",
              wa_card(
                class = "stat-card",
                wa_container(
                  class = "wa-stack",
                  style = "gap: 0.35rem;",
                  span(class = "stat-label", "Rows"),
                  span(class = "stat-value", textOutput("row_count", inline = TRUE))
                )
              ),
              wa_card(
                class = "stat-card",
                wa_container(
                  class = "wa-stack",
                  style = "gap: 0.35rem;",
                  span(class = "stat-label", "Correlation"),
                  span(class = "stat-value", textOutput("correlation_value", inline = TRUE))
                )
              ),
              wa_card(
                class = "stat-card",
                wa_container(
                  class = "wa-stack",
                  style = "gap: 0.35rem;",
                  span(class = "stat-label", "Focus"),
                  span(class = "stat-value", textOutput("focus_value", inline = TRUE))
                )
              )
            ),
            wa_tab_group(
              "surface_tabs",
              active = "chart",
              nav = list(
                wa_tab("Chart", panel = "chart"),
                wa_tab("Summary", panel = "summary"),
                wa_tab("Details", panel = "details")
              ),
              wa_tab_panel(
                name = "chart",
                wa_container(
                  class = "tab-stack tab-shell",
                  p(
                    class = "tab-copy",
                    "The chart tab is the live center of gravity. Change a variable or species on the left and the plot responds immediately."
                  ),
                  wa_container(
                    class = "plot-shell",
                    plotOutput("iris_plot", height = "280px")
                  )
                )
              ),
              wa_tab_panel(
                name = "summary",
                wa_container(
                  class = "tab-stack tab-shell",
                  p(
                    class = "tab-copy",
                    "The summary tab turns the same filtered data into a compact numeric view."
                  ),
                  wa_container(
                    class = "table-shell",
                    tableOutput("summary_table")
                  )
                )
              ),
              wa_tab_panel(
                name = "details",
                wa_container(
                  class = "tab-stack tab-shell",
                  p(
                    class = "tab-copy",
                    "The details tab uses expandable sections for interpretation instead of adding more permanent chrome."
                  ),
                  wa_details(
                    "story_details",
                    summary = "What this view is showing",
                    open = TRUE,
                    p(class = "details-copy", textOutput("details_text"))
                  ),
                  wa_details(
                    "change_details",
                    summary = "What changed from the controls",
                    p(class = "details-copy", textOutput("change_text"))
                  )
                )
              )
            )
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    if (is.null(input$species) || input$species == "all") {
      iris
    } else {
      iris[tolower(iris$Species) == input$species, , drop = FALSE]
    }
  })

  observeEvent(input$preset_sepal, {
    update_wa_select(session, "x_var", value = "Sepal.Length")
    update_wa_select(session, "y_var", value = "Sepal.Width")
  })

  observeEvent(input$preset_petal, {
    update_wa_select(session, "x_var", value = "Petal.Length")
    update_wa_select(session, "y_var", value = "Petal.Width")
  })

  observeEvent(input$open_help, {
    wa_call_method("help_drawer", "show", session = session)
  })

  observeEvent(input$close_help, {
    wa_call_method("help_drawer", "hide", session = session)
  })

  output$tab_specific_controls <- renderUI({
    active_tab <- input$surface_tabs %||% "chart"

    if (active_tab == "chart") {
      wa_container(
        class = "wa-stack",
        style = "gap: 0.85rem;",
        wa_select(
          "y_var",
          label = "Y variable",
          value = "Petal.Width",
          wa_option("Sepal length", value = "Sepal.Length"),
          wa_option("Sepal width", value = "Sepal.Width"),
          wa_option("Petal length", value = "Petal.Length"),
          wa_option("Petal width", value = "Petal.Width")
        ),
        wa_switch("show_smoother", "Show trend line", checked = TRUE)
      )
    } else if (active_tab == "summary") {
      wa_container(
        class = "wa-stack",
        style = "gap: 0.85rem;",
        wa_select(
          "focus_metric",
          label = "Summary focus",
          value = "mean",
          wa_option("Mean", value = "mean"),
          wa_option("Median", value = "median"),
          wa_option("Maximum", value = "max")
        ),
        wa_callout(
          variant = "brand",
          appearance = "soft",
          icon = "table-columns",
          "This tab keeps the same filter state and changes only how the data is summarized."
        )
      )
    } else {
      wa_container(
        class = "wa-stack",
        style = "gap: 0.85rem;",
        wa_select(
          "detail_focus",
          label = "Narrative focus",
          value = "pattern",
          wa_option("Pattern", value = "pattern"),
          wa_option("Spread", value = "spread"),
          wa_option("Recommendation", value = "recommendation")
        ),
        wa_callout(
          variant = "brand",
          appearance = "soft",
          icon = "sparkles",
          "The details tab is where explanatory copy catches up to the current filtered view."
        )
      )
    }
  })

  output$selection_badges <- renderUI({
    species_label <- if ((input$species %||% "all") == "all") {
      "All species"
    } else {
      tools::toTitleCase(input$species)
    }

    tagList(
      wa_badge(species_label, appearance = "accent"),
      wa_badge(
        sprintf(
          "%s vs %s",
          input$x_var %||% "Sepal.Length",
          input$y_var %||% "Petal.Width"
        ),
        appearance = "outlined"
      )
    )
  })

  output$tab_badge <- renderText({
    tools::toTitleCase(input$surface_tabs %||% "chart")
  })

  output$row_count <- renderText(nrow(filtered_data()))

  output$correlation_value <- renderText({
    data <- filtered_data()
    x_var <- input$x_var %||% "Sepal.Length"
    y_var <- input$y_var %||% "Petal.Width"
    sprintf("%.2f", cor(data[[x_var]], data[[y_var]]))
  })

  output$focus_value <- renderText({
    active_tab <- input$surface_tabs %||% "chart"
    if (active_tab == "summary") {
      tools::toTitleCase(input$focus_metric %||% "mean")
    } else if (active_tab == "details") {
      tools::toTitleCase(input$detail_focus %||% "pattern")
    } else {
      if (isTRUE(input$show_smoother %||% TRUE)) "Trend on" else "Trend off"
    }
  })

  output$sidebar_note <- renderText({
    active_tab <- input$surface_tabs %||% "chart"
    if (active_tab == "chart") {
      "Preset buttons jump between sepal and petal views without making you rebuild the whole plot by hand."
    } else if (active_tab == "summary") {
      "Summary focus changes the statistic, but it stays tied to the same filtered data."
    } else {
      "Narrative focus changes the interpretation copy so the demo stays visible and self-explanatory."
    }
  })

  output$iris_plot <- renderPlot({
    data <- filtered_data()
    x_var <- input$x_var %||% "Sepal.Length"
    y_var <- input$y_var %||% "Petal.Width"

    p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]], color = Species)) +
      geom_point(size = 2.8, alpha = 0.85) +
      labs(x = x_var, y = y_var) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#d8dee9"),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
      )

    if (isTRUE(input$show_smoother %||% TRUE)) {
      p <- p + geom_smooth(se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.9, color = "#1d4ed8")
    }

    p
  })

  output$summary_table <- renderTable({
    data <- filtered_data()
    focus <- input$focus_metric %||% "mean"
    x_var <- input$x_var %||% "Sepal.Length"
    y_var <- input$y_var %||% "Petal.Width"

    stat_fn <- switch(
      focus,
      mean = mean,
      median = median,
      max = max
    )

    data.frame(
      measure = c(x_var, y_var),
      value = c(
        round(stat_fn(data[[x_var]]), 2),
        round(stat_fn(data[[y_var]]), 2)
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }, striped = TRUE, bordered = FALSE, width = "100%")

  output$details_text <- renderText({
    focus <- input$detail_focus %||% "pattern"
    x_var <- input$x_var %||% "Sepal.Length"
    y_var <- input$y_var %||% "Petal.Width"
    data <- filtered_data()
    corr <- round(cor(data[[x_var]], data[[y_var]]), 2)

    if (focus == "pattern") {
      paste(
        "The current view compares", x_var, "against", y_var, "for", nrow(data),
        "rows. The relationship is strongest when the species filter narrows the visual noise."
      )
    } else if (focus == "spread") {
      paste(
        "This filtered slice has a correlation of", corr, "between", x_var, "and",
        y_var, "which makes the separation between species either obvious or subtle depending on the chosen variables."
      )
    } else {
      "If you want a quick explanatory panel in a real app, keep it close to the chart and let the controls drive the story in plain language."
    }
  })

  output$change_text <- renderText({
    active_tab <- input$surface_tabs %||% "chart"
    if (active_tab == "chart") {
      paste(
        "The chart is using", input$x_var %||% "Sepal.Length", "on the x-axis and",
        input$y_var %||% "Petal.Width", "on the y-axis",
        if (isTRUE(input$show_smoother %||% TRUE)) "with a trend line." else "without a trend line."
      )
    } else if (active_tab == "summary") {
      paste("The summary tab is showing the", input$focus_metric %||% "mean", "for the same filtered variables.")
    } else {
      paste("The details tab is currently emphasizing", input$detail_focus %||% "pattern", "for the filtered iris subset.")
    }
  })

  output$inspector_state <- renderUI({
    species_label <- if ((input$species %||% "all") == "all") {
      "All species"
    } else {
      tools::toTitleCase(input$species)
    }

    wa_container(
      class = "wa-stack",
      style = "gap: 0.5rem;",
      wa_badge(paste("Tab:", tools::toTitleCase(input$surface_tabs %||% "chart")), appearance = "accent"),
      wa_badge(paste("Species:", species_label), appearance = "outlined"),
      wa_badge(paste("X:", input$x_var %||% "Sepal.Length"), appearance = "outlined"),
      wa_badge(paste("Y:", input$y_var %||% "Petal.Width"), appearance = "outlined")
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

## Design Philosophy

Placeholder.

## Shiny Bindings

Placeholder.

## Command API

Placeholder.

## Conclusion

Placeholder.
